items.author: Swyx
items.bio: AI Engineer founder, Latent Space podcast
items.content_zh: Swyx 把 2026 称为「subagent 之年」，但他指出更难的反向问题：打造能组合并调度其他 agent 的「boss-agent」。作为 Cognition 的顾问，他三个月前就参与了全新 Spaces 概念的设计，而今天的发布只是开始。
items.content_en: Swyx frames 2026 as the 'year of subagents,' but flags the harder inverse problem: building boss-agents that compose and query other agents. As an advisor to Cognition, he helped design the new Spaces concept three months ago — today's launch is just the start of more to come.

items.author: Swyx
items.bio: AI Engineer founder, Latent Space podcast
items.content_zh: Swyx 判断 Meta 的 AI 叙事正在迎来转折：Llama 4 扑街之后，MSL 在 2025 年「汤之战」后加速招人，Zuck 甚至搬去和 Alexandr、Nat 住在一起重新写代码；他们已经正式发布了接近 Opus 水准的模型，并收购 Dreamer 和 Manus 来构建 AI OS 的 prosumer 层。
items.content_en: Swyx calls the turn in Meta's AI arc: after the Llama 4 flop, MSL has been hiring aggressively since the 2025 'soup wars,' Zuck has literally moved in with Alexandr and Nat and is coding again, Meta GA'ed an Opus-ish model, and bought Dreamer and Manus to build the AI OS prosumer layer.

items.author: Josh Woodward
items.content_zh: Google Labs/Gemini VP Josh Woodward 发布 Mac 版 Gemini——100% 原生 Swift 打造，由一支小团队在不到 100 天内上线了 100 多项功能。他公开征集用户反馈，了解还有哪些不足。
items.content_en: Google Labs/Gemini VP Josh Woodward launches Gemini on Mac — 100% native Swift, built by a small team that shipped 100+ features in under 100 days. He's asking users for feedback on what still needs polish.

items.author: Thariq
items.content_zh: Anthropic 的 Thariq 解释：Claude Code 的 1M 上下文窗口是一把双刃剑——它让模型能处理更复杂的任务，但若 session 没管理好，也更容易被上下文污染。用户现在可以通过环境变量（如 CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW=400000）自定义 autocompact 阈值，把上下文窗口锁定在合适区间。
items.content_en: Anthropic's Thariq explains Claude Code's 1M-context window is double-edged — it unlocks more complex tasks but invites context pollution if sessions aren't managed. Users can now set their own autocompact threshold (e.g. CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW=400000) to effectively cap the context window to a sweet spot.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Box CEO Aaron Levie 认为 AI 会在许多行业创造更多岗位：每次 AI 提升一个环节的产出，下游就会出现一个仍依赖人类的新瓶颈——AI 驱动的法律咨询增加，律师需求也随之增加；AI 生成代码更多，安全研究员缺口也更大；AI 做销售触达，最终还是会带来更多人对人的销售会谈。效率收益终会见顶，因为竞争对手也会用 AI，「要么跟上要么死亡」反而让总需求持续膨胀。
items.content_en: Box CEO Aaron Levie argues AI will create more jobs across industries because every time AI accelerates one step, a new bottleneck appears downstream that still needs humans — more AI-driven legal queries means more lawyers, more AI-generated code means more security researchers, more AI outreach means more sales conversations. Efficiency gains tap out because competitors will use AI too, so 'match them or die' keeps total demand growing.

items.author: Ryo Lu
items.content_zh: Cursor 设计师 Ryo Lu 透露一窥未来：新的 /canvas 命令让用户可以在 Cursor 内部直接为 agent 构建自定义界面。
items.content_en: Cursor designer Ryo Lu teases a glimpse of the future: the new /canvas command lets users build custom interfaces for their agents directly inside Cursor.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: YC CEO Garry Tan 展示 GBrain 的架构优势：基于 git + Postgres 的设计让多个 agent 可以同时工作而互不干扰。
items.content_en: Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan shows off GBrain's architecture — built on git + Postgres, it works wonderfully with multiple agents operating simultaneously without stepping on each other.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: Garry Tan 宣告「OpenClaw 不安全」的时代到四月已经结束：有了 Docker 沙箱、mitmproxy 日志防火墙以及 Clawvisor，整套安全方案已直面此前的主要担忧。
items.content_en: Garry Tan declares the 'OpenClaw is insecure' era over as of April: with Docker sandbox, mitmproxy logging firewall, and Clawvisor in place, the stack now addresses the main security concerns head-on.

items.author: Matt Turck
items.bio: FirstMark Capital VC, MAD Podcast host
items.content_zh: Matt Turck 转述 Anthropic Claude Cowork 的路线图只规划一个月——AI 发展太快，规划再远已经没意义。Cowork 负责人 Felix Rieseberg 的原则是：发布、评估、迭代。
items.content_en: Matt Turck relays that the Claude Cowork roadmap at Anthropic is just one month long — AI is moving too fast to plan any further. Cowork head Felix Rieseberg's philosophy: ship, evaluate, iterate.

items.author: Zara Zhang
items.content_zh: Zara Zhang 表示：用 HTML 做 slides 之后就再也回不去了——她的 demo 是在 AnyGenIO 的全新「Frontend Slides」功能里做的，用代码原生的方式取代了 PowerPoint 式的幻灯片制作。
items.content_en: Zara Zhang says once you use HTML to make slides, you can't go back — made with the new Frontend Slides feature in AnyGenIO, which replaces PowerPoint-style authoring with code-native slide design.

items.author: Zara Zhang
items.content_zh: Zara Zhang 认为 AI 工作里的「玩」应该被更严肃地对待——指的是那种非功利、实验性地试探模型边界的探索。回头看，这往往是她一天里最有生产力的部分，而不是浪费时间。
items.content_en: Zara Zhang argues 'play' should be taken more seriously in AI work — non-utilitarian, experimental testing of a model's limits. In hindsight, she often finds it's the most productive part of her day, not a waste of time.

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.content_zh: Nikunj Kothari 补充对 AI 辅助工程的看法：确实可以把系统图喂给 Claude Code 并一次性搞定很多工作，但要达到那种清晰度本身就需要长时间的积累，而这正是 AI 目前还无法替代的部分。关于「苦涩的教训」——5 到 10 年和无限算力或许会改写结论，但现在 AI 还没有习得你经过时间沉淀得到的清晰与判断。
items.content_en: Nikunj Kothari follows up on AI-assisted engineering: yes, you can give Claude Code system diagrams and one-shot a lot, but reaching that level of clarity takes a long time — and it's exactly what AI can't yet replicate. On the bitter lesson: 5-10 years and infinite compute may change the math, but right now AI hasn't learned the lessons you have.

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.content_zh: Nikunj Kothari 给出一句简短的人生忠告：找到真正在乎你的人——可能是导师、创始人、投资人、顾问或客户。人生太短，不值得与那些毫不在乎的人共事，而「真正在乎」可能是最强的护城河。
items.content_en: Nikunj Kothari offers a concise life lesson: find someone who genuinely cares — a mentor, founder, VC, advisor, or customer. Life's too short to work with people who don't give a damn, and it may turn out to be the greatest moat of all.

items.author: Peter Steinberger
items.content_zh: Peter Steinberger 详细介绍 OpenClaw 四个月来的安全重塑：完整方案允许用户既可「全 yolo」运行，也可在 Docker 或 OpenShell 沙箱里使用，加上 allow-list 与按访问级别弹出的 exec 允许/拒绝 prompt，并已由数百名安全研究员完成渗透测试。
items.content_en: Peter Steinberger details OpenClaw's 4-month security overhaul: a full concept now lets users go full yolo, run inside a Docker or OpenShell sandbox, use allow-lists, and handle per-access exec allow/deny prompts — all pen-tested by hundreds of security researchers.

items.author: Dan Shipper
items.content_zh: Every CEO Dan Shipper 用一句话总结他当下的世界观：「everything is coding agent」（万物皆编码 agent）——这是关于「所有知识工作型产品最终都会由一个能写代码、跑代码的 AI agent 来交付」这一新兴观点的浓缩表达。
items.content_en: Every CEO Dan Shipper distills his current worldview to four words: 'everything is coding agent' — shorthand for the emerging thesis that every knowledge-work product will ultimately be delivered by an AI agent writing and executing code.
